    KafkaTopicProvisioner.normalalizeBootPropsWithBinder(Map<String,Object> adminProps, org.springframework.boot.kafka.autoconfigure.KafkaProperties bootProps, KafkaBinderConfigurationProperties binderProps)
    In general, binder properties supersede boot kafka properties.

  • Uses of KafkaBinderConfigurationProperties in org.springframework.cloud.stream.binder.kafka.utils

    Methods in org.springframework.cloud.stream.binder.kafka.utils with parameters of type KafkaBinderConfigurationProperties
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static Map<String,Object>
    BindingUtils.createConsumerConfigs(boolean anonymous, String consumerGroup, ExtendedConsumerProperties<KafkaConsumerProperties> consumerProperties, KafkaBinderConfigurationProperties configurationProperties)
    Create the Kafka configuration map for a consumer binding.
    static Map<String,Object>
    BindingUtils.createProducerConfigs(ExtendedProducerProperties<KafkaProducerProperties> producerProperties, KafkaBinderConfigurationProperties configurationProperties)
    Create the Kafka configuration map for a producer binding.
    static org.springframework.kafka.support.converter.MessageConverter
    BindingUtils.getConsumerMessageConverter(org.springframework.context.ApplicationContext applicationContext, ExtendedConsumerProperties<KafkaConsumerProperties> extendedConsumerProperties, KafkaBinderConfigurationProperties configurationProperties)
    Get the message converter for consumer bindings from the application context.
    static org.springframework.kafka.support.KafkaHeaderMapper
    BindingUtils.getHeaderMapper(org.springframework.context.ApplicationContext applicationContext, KafkaBinderConfigurationProperties configurationProperties)
    Get the header mapper bean, if the binder properties contains a bean name; if not look for a bean with name kafkaBinderHeaderMapper is looked up; if that doesn't exist, null is returned.
